case_title: JADE JURDI VS. DR. LAWRENCE JO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JURDI, JADE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JO, DR. LAWRENCE CHINESE COMMUNITY HEALTH CARE ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
